description_long: This handbag features a wide, trapezoidal body with a slightly flared silhouette, giving it a spacious and practical appearance. The bag is equipped with two long, sturdy handles that arch gracefully above the main compartment, allowing for comfortable hand or shoulder carrying. The sides of the bag taper inward toward the base, creating a sleek and modern profile. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no visible decorative elements, patterns, or external pockets. The closure mechanism is not visible, suggesting it may be internal or minimalistic. The overall design is functional and understated, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A spacious, trapezoidal handbag with long handles and a smooth, unadorned surface, designed for practical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared body and two long handles arching above the main compartment.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile and the length of the handles, with the bag tapering toward the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same wide silhouette and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the slim side profile and handle attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, fixed handles suitable for hand or shoulder carrying; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Closure mechanism not visible; likely internal zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
